# PR Checklist

## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Verification evidence
- Reproduction steps:
- Tests run:
- Lint/typecheck:
- Screenshots/logs if relevant:

## Source-of-truth updates
- [ ] docs/prd/current.md reviewed/updated
- [ ] ADR added/updated if major decision changed
- [ ] memory updates written if operationally relevant

## Risks / rollback
- Risks:
- Rollback plan:
